rootCause: The electronics tin-soldering-iron quest kept a legacy filename (`soldering-intro.json`) while its canonical quest id had already moved to `electronics/tin-soldering-iron`, causing source links and path-derived references to drift.
resolution: Renamed the quest JSON file to match its id, updated path-based references, and added a regression test that enforces `quest.id === <tree>/<filename>` across all quest JSON files.
